title: Add label and due-date support for Trello cards
body:
## Summary
The skill is missing two core task-management features: labels and due dates. These are more useful than deletes and should land before heavier workflow automation.

## Goal
Add safe support for label management and date fields on cards.

## Scope
- list labels on a board
- create a label on a board if needed
- add a label to a card
- remove a label from a card
- set a card due date
- clear a card due date
- if start dates are easy to support cleanly, include them; otherwise leave them out of this issue

## Requirements
- label resolution must be explicit and ambiguity-safe
- do not add broad update everything mutations that make review harder
- keep CLI flags narrow and readable
- preserve current card update behavior

## Acceptance criteria
- new client helpers exist for labels and due dates
- scripts exist for list/create/apply/remove label operations and due-date set/clear
- tests cover request construction and CLI compatibility
- docs are updated with examples

## Notes
This issue should not include checklist support, automation, or board-wide workflow rules.
